notes: Pasco County FL Clerk & Comptroller — in-house classic-ASP Official Records search on bare Microsoft-IIS/10.0 at app.pascoclerk.com (probed 2026-06-10, see 0610/Pasco_RILEY_v1/phase0_probe_recorder.md). NO Cloudflare / NO captcha / NO disclaimer on the search page. Adapter: adapters/pasco_http_adapter.py (pure HTTP, curl_cffi). Request shapes verified verbatim from form HTML: name search POST name-search.asp {name (LAST FIRST, max 30), fromdate/todate (YYYY-MM-DD), docset (verbatim label, deed-first = 'DEED / PROPERTY TRANSFER'), namedir (A/D/R), Submit}; instrument POST instrument-list.asp {instrStart}; book/page POST bookpage-list.asp {book,page}. WAVE-2 BLOCKERS: (1) result-row HTML shape UNVERIFIED — live POSTs with party names need user approval (No Assumptions Policy); extract_results is fixture-locked defensive parser; (2) doc-image/PDF endpoint UNVERIFIED — download_pdf falls back to cached row href + %PDF magic check; (3) pascocountyclerk.com + officialrecords.* hosts unreachable from dev network (timeout/NXDOMAIN) — could not check whether a newer portal exists there. Trust vesting note (RILEY): run individual names AND trust/trustee variants; indexing convention unknown until first live run.
